zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhys ap Dafydd Llwyd於大約1440年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion36歲，母親Gwenllian Verch Maredudd28歲。他於1465年之前與Margaret verch Evan of Neuadd-wen在威爾士結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1469年登記服兵役。他去世於1469年在英國奧可福爾班波瑞享年30歲。

zh-hans.Cowney, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾考尼
zh-hans.Nanhoran Issa, Caernarvonshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾
zh-hans.Newtown, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾紐托
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhys ap Dafydd Llwyd于大约1440年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion36岁，母亲Gwenllian Verch Maredudd28岁。他于1465年之前与Margaret verch Evan of Neuadd-wen在威尔士结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1469年登记服兵役。他去世于1469年在英国奧可福爾班波瑞享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhys ap Dafydd Llwyd was born about 1440, in Wales, his father, Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion, was 36 and his mother, Gwenllian Verch Maredudd, was 28. He married Margaret verch Evan of Neuadd-wen before 1465, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1469. He died in 1469, in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhys ap Dafydd Llwyd est né environ 1440, à Galles, son père, Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian Verch Maredudd, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret verch Evan of Neuadd-wen avant 1465, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1469. Il est décédé en 1469, à Banbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhys ap Dafydd Llwyd um 1440 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion 36 und seine Mutter Gwenllian Verch Maredudd 28. Er hat vor 1465 in Wales Margaret verch Evan of Neuadd-wen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1469 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1469 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England.

ht.Nanhoran Issa, Caernarvonshire, Wales: Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys ap Dafydd Llwyd è nato il circa 1440 nel Galles, il suo padre, Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian Verch Maredudd, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret verch Evan of Neuadd-wen prima del 1465, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1469. Morì nel 1469, nel Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.Banbury, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアバンブリー

ja.Newtown, Montgomeryshire, Wales: ウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアニュートウン
ja.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Dafydd Llwydが約1440年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einionは36歳，母Gwenllian Verch Mareduddは28歳であった。1465年以前にウェールズでMargaret verch Evan of Neuadd-wenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1469年に兵役登録をした。彼は1469年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアバンブリーで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Dafydd Llwyd(이)가 대략 1440년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian Verch Maredudd(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1465년 이전 웨일스에서 Margaret verch Evan of Neuadd-wen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1469년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1469년 영국 스퍼드실르 반버이에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Nanhoran Issa, Caernarvonshire, Wales: Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys ap Dafydd Llwyd nasceu aproximadamente 1440, em Gales, seu pai, Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian Verch Maredudd, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret verch Evan of Neuadd-wen antes 1465, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1469. Ele faleceu em 1469, em Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhys ap Dafydd Llwyd родился около 1440 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian Verch Maredudd, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret verch Evan of Neuadd-wen перед 1465 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1469 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1469 г. в местности банбури, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rhys ap Dafydd Llwyd nació aproximadamente 1440, en Gales, su papá, Dafydd Llwyd ap Dafydd ap Einion, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Gwenllian Verch Maredudd, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret verch Evan of Neuadd-wen antes de 1465, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1469. Murió en 1469, en Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
